title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Reiju, Sanji, Luffy, Nami, Big Mom as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Starting now, we're gonna bust up big mom's tea party and wedding,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And save Sanji's family! And once we're done...

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: SANJILL COME BACK TO US!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: B... BIG...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Someone seems

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Luffy... We're talking about a yonko here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The last thing I want is to endanger everyone...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, Endanger Nami because of my own selfish-ness...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: YaaaaAA AAAAY-!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell's your problem...?! I heard you had a huge fight with Luffy, so....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I was crazy worried, you dummy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm just... so happy... you dummy~!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You simple- ton!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So as long as we do all that, Sanji will come back to the crew, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Nami?! UHm...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... and Sanji. Regarding the matter of you throwing me down into the depths of fear itself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Someone needs to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll never forgive you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, I suppose I can put it behind me for the time being.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tea party's just around the corner, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So I'm gonna bring you back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if I have to drag you! Got it, Sanji?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eeehhh?! Could you be... proposing to me, Nami?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...this all makes me feel oddly relieved.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, Luffy! We all know what we've gotta do.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yep! And now that I think of it, Sanji's big sis saved my life!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahh... then we must save her at all costs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that's easier said than done....! Even though we don't necessarily have to take out big mom herself,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every time Mama has a tea party, she looks forward to it from the very bottom of her heart! To destroy all that would mean...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To incite the full-blown wrath of one of the yonko...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And what's more, you all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems you've already been confronted by various min- isters, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Within the big mom pirates, they are but the tip of the iceberg!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There will surely be many fierce warriors above even them in attendance at the tea party!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And, not to mention...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The emperors of the under- world, invited from various nations from across the seas...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As for we, who are standing against them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: there are merely...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ten of us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Don't you include us in this mess! :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't go fudging the numbers! There's merely eight of you! Not ten!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you can all go and get yourselves murdered as far as I'm concerned!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
